title: URL decoration for states and transitions
manager: Let states and transitions carry URLs so a rendered node becomes a link — to docs, to a ticket, to the code it models — turning a diagram into a navigable index of a system. The catch, resolved per #317, is that URLs are allowed in-language but must be sanitized (escape + nofollow) at the render layer so a diagram can't become an attack vector.
cs: folds fsl#421 (transition URL decoration); render-layer sanitization REQUIRED per #317 resolution
